title: Dark/light theme and typography for public documentation
description: Apply a visually polished theme to the public layout referencing Material Design Docs / Atlassian Design System — careful typography, spacing, and a dark/light mode toggle with persisted preference.
acceptanceCriteria: Public layout has both a light and dark theme, each with legible contrast ratios for body text, headings, code blocks, and callouts
A visible toggle switches theme instantly without a page reload
Theme preference persists across visits (e.g. `localStorage`) and respects `prefers-color-scheme` as the initial default when no preference is stored
Typography uses a clear heading scale and comfortable line-length/line-height for prose, distinct from the admin panel's denser editing UI
Code blocks and callouts (info/warning/tip) have visually distinct, theme-aware styling in both modes

steps.details: Create a small design-token set (CSS custom properties or a theme object) for background, text, border, and accent colors per callout variant, defined for both light and dark, applied to the public layout root.
Add a toggle button in the public layout header, switching a `data-theme` attribute on the root element and persisting the choice to `localStorage`.
On first visit (no stored preference), initialize theme from `window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')`.

steps.description: Apply typography scale to prose content
steps.details: Style the `PageRenderer` (TASK-50) output with a clear heading scale (h1-h3), readable body font size/line-height, and appropriate max content width for readability.

steps.description: Style code blocks and callouts per theme
steps.details: Ensure code blocks have a monospace font and theme-aware background/foreground; ensure each callout variant (info/warning/tip) has distinct, accessible-contrast colors in both light and dark.

Using Playwright: load the public site with light system preference and confirm light theme; toggle to dark and reload, confirming the choice persisted; visually spot-check a page containing all block types in both themes via screenshot.

technicalNotes: This task is scoped to the public reading experience per the PRD's success criteria ('visualmente comparável às referências citadas'); the admin editing panel's visual polish is not required to match this bar.
